instructor_title.name: instructor_title
instructor_title.default: 'Founder & Principal Safety Engineer · TÜV FS Eng., IFSP'

brand_tagline.name: brand_tagline
brand_tagline.default: 'Your trusted systems-safety partner for safety-critical systems and functional-safety compliance.'

closing_cta_subtext.name: closing_cta_subtext
closing_cta_subtext.default: 'Integrate functional safety without slowing down development. Let’s talk about your next safety-critical system.'

blurb.name: blurb
blurb.default: 'Your trusted systems-safety partner for safety-critical systems and functional-safety compliance.'

copyright.name: copyright
copyright.default: '© 2026 Critical Systems Analysis. All rights reserved.'

welcome_sub_with_courses.name: welcome_sub_with_courses
welcome_sub_with_courses.default: 'Pick up where you left off, track your progress, and grab your certificates — all in one place.'

welcome_sub_no_courses.name: welcome_sub_no_courses
welcome_sub_no_courses.default: 'This is your learning home. Enroll in a course and your progress, lessons, and certificates will live here.'

empty_state_heading.name: empty_state_heading
empty_state_heading.default: 'You’re not enrolled in any courses yet.'

empty_state_body.name: empty_state_body
empty_state_body.default: 'Browse the catalog to find practical, on-demand functional-safety training — grounded in the standards and hazards of your sector. Enroll once and your progress shows up right here.'

onboarding_welcome_step_heading.name: onboarding_welcome_step_heading
onboarding_welcome_step_heading.default: 'Functional safety training, built for working engineers.'

onboarding_welcome_step_body.name: onboarding_welcome_step_body
onboarding_welcome_step_body.default: 'You’re in. CSA Academy turns dense standards into practical, on-demand training you can apply on real hardware. This 60-second tour shows you how courses work, where to find resources, and how to set up your profile.'

onboarding_courses_step_intro.name: onboarding_courses_step_intro
onboarding_courses_step_intro.default: 'Every program follows the same simple loop — watch, confirm, and earn proof you can show an assessor.'

onboarding_resources_step_intro.name: onboarding_resources_step_intro
onboarding_resources_step_intro.default: 'Reference material, your template library, and an AI assistant are never more than a click away.'

onboarding_profile_step_intro.name: onboarding_profile_step_intro
onboarding_profile_step_intro.default: 'Confirm your details and pick the tracks you care about — we’ll surface the most relevant courses first.'

onboarding_complete_step_body.name: onboarding_complete_step_body
onboarding_complete_step_body.default: 'Your learning home is ready. Jump back into a course, or browse the catalog to add another.'

header_subheading.name: header_subheading
header_subheading.default: 'Manage your account and billing, download the templates you own, and review your order history — all in one place.'

account_intro.name: account_intro
account_intro.default: 'Manage your profile, sign-in email, and password. These details are stored against your account and sync everywhere you use CSA.'

billing_intro.name: billing_intro
billing_intro.default: 'Your saved payment method, billing details, and every invoice and receipt. Card data is held by Stripe — CSA never stores raw card numbers.'

billing_no_payment_method.name: billing_no_payment_method
billing_no_payment_method.default: 'No payment method on file. Add a card to check out faster. We use Stripe for secure, PCI-compliant payments — your card details never touch CSA servers.'

billing_no_invoices.name: billing_no_invoices
billing_no_invoices.default: 'No invoices yet. When you purchase a template, bundle, or course, the paid invoice and receipt will appear here as downloadable PDFs.'

templates_intro.name: templates_intro
templates_intro.default: 'Every documentation template you own, ready to download anytime. Files are served from secure storage and you always get the latest revision you’re entitled to.'

templates_empty_state.name: templates_empty_state
templates_empty_state.default: 'Your library is empty. Templates and bundles you purchase appear here as downloadable Word and Excel files — with version and format details, re-downloadable whenever you need them.'

orders_intro.name: orders_intro
orders_intro.default: 'A record of every purchase on your account — templates, bundles, and courses — with totals, status, and downloadable receipts.'

orders_empty_state.name: orders_empty_state
orders_empty_state.default: 'No orders yet. Once you make your first purchase, it’ll show up here with the date, order number, items, total, and a receipt you can download.'

version_header_subheading.name: version_header_subheading
version_header_subheading.default: 'Manage your account and billing, download the templates you own, and review your order history — all in one place.'

header_subheading.name: header_subheading
header_subheading.default: 'Review the templates and courses in your cart, then continue to secure checkout.'

empty_cart_body.name: empty_cart_body
empty_cart_body.default: 'Browse functional-safety templates and on-demand courses to get started — everything you add shows up here, ready for one secure checkout.'

trust_secure_line.name: trust_secure_line
trust_secure_line.default: 'Secure checkout powered by Stripe — your card details never touch CSA servers.'

account_choice_guest_body.name: account_choice_guest_body
